ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-05-2021 Continued To Jun-02-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Feb-06-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Claudine L. Sherron for Petitioner, Michael Watkins via Court Call.
Allison K. Bellumori for Petitioner, Paula Coltrin via Court Call.

Ms. Sherron state her client has the process well under way. Ms. Bellumori stated the research is ongoing.

The Court DENIED Michael Watkins' petition for letters of administration.
The Court GREANTED the Paula Coltrin's petition for letters of administration (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Joeseph M. Quinn. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Matter not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-03-2020 Denied

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-08-2020 Continued To Feb-03-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-11-2019 Continued To Jan-08-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Claudine Sherron appeared by telephone for Michael Watkins (Petitioner).
Allison Bellumori appeared by telephone for Paula Colpirn (Objector).

The Court noted that it did not get a proof of service of the objections. Ms. Sherron stated that she has not been served with the objections. Ms. Bellumori stated that it was her understanding that it was served and that she intends to file a competing petition. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to January 8, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Bellumori is to serve her objections and file a proof of service.
